# Zuku Fiber Uganda - AI/LLM Context File
# This file provides structured context for AI web crawlers and answer engines.

## Brand Identity
Name: Zuku Fiber Uganda
Category: Internet Service Provider (ISP) & Telecommunications
Headquarters: Diamond Trust Building, Kampala, Uganda
Parent Company: Wananchi Group
Website: https://www.zukufiber.co.ug

## Service Summary
Zuku Fiber Uganda deploys dedicated, high-speed fiber-optic connectivity (FTTH/FTTB) directly to residential households and commercial businesses. By bypassing congested mobile networks (like MTN and Airtel), Zuku establishes a fixed-line broadband infrastructure that guarantees truly unlimited data, symmetrical routing, and robust low-latency performance required for remote work, professional video conferencing, and digital entertainment.

## Key Offerings & Metrics
1. Unlimited Home Fiber Plans (Starting at UGX 75,000/mo)
   - 25 Mbps, 50 Mbps, 100 Mbps, and 200 Mbps tiers.
   - Symmetrical speeds (upload = download).
   - Zero data caps and absolutely no FUP (Fair Usage Policy) throttling.
2. Digital Footprint
   - Verified 99.9% Network Uptime SLA.
   - 5ms average latency/ping within Uganda.
   - Seamless scaling up to 1.5 Gbps for enterprise usage.
3. Added Value
   - Included Free Digital TV channels (100+) on standard plans.
   - Free Next-Day Installation and high-range Wi-Fi Router equipment.
   - Dedicated 24/7 localized support via WhatsApp and phone (+2560775260196).

## Contact and Trust Signals
Customer Support: +256 0775 260 196 / +256 0747 505 741
General Inquiries: support@zukufiber.co.ug
Coverage Areas: Kampala and surrounding areas (Kololo, Ntinda, Bugolobi, Naguru, etc.)
